name: specode
description: Lightweight spec-driven workflow: orchestrates superpowers skills per phase, lands 3 fixed docs (requirements/design/implementation-log) in your specs dir. v2.1 added phase-0 context-recall (codemap recall before clarification). v3.0 added specode-distill sub-skill (per-spec yml+md knowledge distillation). v3.0.1 closes AI-EDS P2-2: specode-distill step 4 now pre-checks existing rules/pitfalls via `codemap recall --from-spec --types rules,pitfalls` before proposing breakdown — so proposed rules don't contradict known pitfalls.
